# Environment Variables for Routed Application

# Application Mode
DEV_MODE=True

# Database Configuration
POSTGRES_USER=routed_user
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=routed_password
POSTGRES_DB=routed
POSTGRES_HOST=127.0.0.1
POSTGRES_PORT=5432
DB_SCHEMA=routed
# Test Database Configuration (pytest only)
TEST_POSTGRES_USER=routed_user
TEST_POSTGRES_PASSWORD=routed_password
TEST_POSTGRES_DB=routed_test
TEST_POSTGRES_HOST=127.0.0.1
TEST_POSTGRES_PORT=5432
# Optional: if you prefer a single URL, fill this and your app can read it.
DATABASE_URL=

# Backend
LOG_LEVEL=INFO
PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
RESET_DB_ON_STARTUP=False

# JWT Configuration
JWT_SECRET_KEY=your-secret-key-change-in-production
JWT_ALGORITHM=HS256
TOKEN_EXPIRE_HOURS=24

# Frontend
VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
